task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/transcribe/route.ts

Fix MediaFormat to be detected from the uploaded file's mime type instead of hardcoded "webm".

Replace the hardcoded MediaFormat: "webm" with:
const mimeType = audioFile.type || "audio/webm";
const mediaFormat = mimeType.includes("mp4") ? "mp4" : mimeType.includes("ogg") ? "ogg" : "webm";

Use mediaFormat in the StartTranscriptionJobCommand.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/transcribe/route.ts

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
MediaFormat derived from file mime type
Supports mp4, ogg, webm
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change anything else
DO NOT: use ast.parse
